use_cases: Send message button in chat and messaging applications
Submit action in contact and feedback forms
Call-to-action button for sending emails or requests
Action trigger for form submissions in web applications
ai_summary: A sleek send button component featuring a paper plane icon that animates with a flying motion effect on hover. The button showcases a solid blue background with rounded corners and includes smooth transitions including icon animation, text movement, and press feedback with active scaling. Designed as a drop-in action button for messaging, form submission, and communication interfaces.
